summary: Re-tested ACN after iter-115 fixes. All 3 previously-failing issues are resolved. Backend pytest: 15/15 pass in 12.87s. Admin rule-update endpoint now returns 200 (was 403), seal completes in <2s for 4-juris packet (was >100s causing 502), and bogus ceremony_id returns 404 (was 400). Frontend ACN dashboard with admin role works end-to-end: Rule Updates tab successfully records a rule change via UI (POST /api/acn/rule-updates → 200) and the new entry appears in 'Recent rule changes' panel.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warnings: <span data-ve-dynamic> wraps <option> elements inside Source Jurisdiction <select>. Cosmetic console noise from Emergent visual-editor framework — not a functional bug, not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: _is_admin() helper in acn_routes.py correctly looks up the user doc from DB and uses `if db is None` (compatible with pymongo/motor truthiness) — solid fix pattern, matches fl_journal_routes/compliance_states_routes convention.

seal_packet() now uses asyncio.gather + asyncio.to_thread for the ReportLab CPU-bound work. 4-juris seal now completes in ~0.7s in pytest (vs >100s previously). Implementation is correct and idiomatic.

Hedera HCS submission still reports submitted=false in this preview env due to TLS cert mismatch (documented mocked-behaviour). PDF sha256 + rule_version_hash chain remain cryptographically valid, so end-user verification is unaffected.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_acn_cross_border.py (renamed analyze-ceremony test to expect 404; tightened seal-perf test to assert <30s)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on retested flows (Rule Updates tab + dashboard + tabs)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@notarychain.com / Admin123! · User: demo@test.com / Demo123! · Notary: notarytest@test.com / Test123!
seed_data_creation: Test run created 1 additional ACN packet for demo@test.com (multi-jurisdiction TX+NY+DE-de+EU) plus 1 packet for notarytest@test.com (FL) plus 1 rule-update record 'TEST_ACN_iter116 rule refresh from UI' for US-TX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-115 ACN issues are resolved. Mocked: Hedera HCS submit returns submitted=false in preview env (TLS) — best-effort, not a bug. If main agent needs to verify, run pytest on /app/backend/tests/test_acn_cross_border.py — all 15 should pass in ~13s. Hydration warnings on <select>/<option> are framework-injected and out of scope for ACN fix.
rca of the issue: No outstanding issues. Iter-115 RCA-validated fixes verified: (1) DB-lookup admin helper bypasses Pydantic User-model field gap; (2) asyncio.gather+to_thread eliminates seal serialization; (3) 404 raised before the doc_text fallback check in analyze route.
